caption: The video shows a person preparing what appears to be a rice krispie treat or a similar cereal-based snack. The scene is set on a wooden table with a large metal mixing bowl containing a mixture of cereal and a binding substance, likely marshmallow. A red spatula is used to mix the ingredients thoroughly. To the right of the bowl, there is a small red cup filled with more of the cereal mixture and a white plate with two rectangular pieces of the finished treat. The person's hand is seen pressing down on the mixture in the bowl, possibly to ensure it is well combined or compacted. The background includes a blue sky with clouds, suggesting the activity is taking place outdoors. The logo "UCAR Center for Science Education" is visible in the top left corner, indicating an educational context for the video.
